product: MySQL integrated CDC pipeline is now in Beta ​
tagline: July 1, 2026 The integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: July 1, 2026 The integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types). An integrated CDC pipeline ingests change data from MySQL into Databricks using a single pipeline, combining extraction and application into one pipeline update.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
